testCases.notes: Add-to-cart from PDP via qty stepper (B2B-store has no separate Add to Cart button — qty + button IS add-to-cart per project memory feedback_qty_stepper_as_add_to_cart.md). qty 0->24 (Erdinger MOQ=24); cart badge incremented; addItem mutation HTTP 200, no errors[]; success notification implicit (badge update).

Quick-add from category list/search results: 3 distinct products added via card stepper without page navigation; cart badge updated to '14' (sum of MOQ); products in cart confirmed via /cart navigation.

Add multiple quantities: covered by CART-035 direct-input pathway (typed '48' qty), line total recalculated, no duplicate line item. Note: stepper unit on Erdinger is 12, so '+' clicks add packs (e.g., 24->36).

testCases.title: Add to Cart - Product Variation
testCases.notes: RELOCATE per CSV: inline variant picker not implemented on standard PDP; covered by Suite 072 (Configurable Products). Skipped per CSV directive 2026-04-21.

View Cart - Display Items: line items show product name, properties (Volume_ml: 550), unit price ($1,050.00 sale / $1,234.00 list strikethrough), qty (24), line total ($25,200.00). All currency to 2 decimals. URL=/cart after navigation. Mini-cart overlay element behavior covered by header cart icon click in browser.

Increase qty on cart page: 24->36 (pack-step=12 since this is a 12-pack product). Line total recalculated 36 × $1,050 = $37,800. Subtotal in OrderSummary updated. changeCartItemQuantity mutation HTTP 200 (no errors[]).
Decrease qty on cart page: 36->24 (pack decrement). At MOQ (24), decrease button is disabled. Math consistent with new qty. changeCartItemQuantity 200.
Direct input on cart page covered by CART-035 (typed '48' qty). Spinbutton commits on Tab/blur, line total recalculates, subtotal updates. No 4xx/5xx on commit.
Remove single item: 'Remove from cart' button (aria-label) clicked; line removed from cart; cart badge cleared (last item). No JS errors. removeCartItem 200.
Empty cart state: 'Your cart is empty' message + 'CONTINUE SHOPPING' button visible after final removal. Cart badge empty. URL stays /cart. No JS errors.

Clear cart: 'CLEAR CART' button shows confirmation dialog 'Do you want to clear your cart? YES/NO' before action. Click YES removed all items; cart empty; badge clear. GA4 begin_checkout event observed in earlier flow.

Subtotal calculation: each line total = unit × qty (24 × $1050 = $25,200; 36 × $1050 = $37,800; 48 × $1234 = $59,232 verified). OrderSummary math: Subtotal − Discount + Tax + Shipping = Total verified across multiple states ($29,616 − $5,416 + $4,840 + $0 = $29,040 ✓; $44,424 − $7,624 + $7,360 + $0 = $44,160 ✓; $59,232 − $9,832 + $9,880 + $0 = $59,280 ✓). Subtotal recalculates immediately on qty change. All amounts to 2 decimal places.

Tax line displayed in OrderSummary as '+ $4,840.00' / '+ $5,039.00' / '+ $7,360.00' / '+ $9,880.00' across qty changes. 2 decimal places. Total = subtotal + tax + shipping − discount confirmed (BL-CHK-006/BL-CART-003).
Shipping cost displayed as '$0.00' in OrderSummary; included in total formula. (No paid shipping method selected — needs Suite 011/012 to validate paid-method selection. Cart-page-only test passes.)

PDP qty stepper increment adds to cart immediately (same flow as CART-001). 'Decrease quantity' button transitioned from disabled (qty=0) to enabled (qty=24). Cart badge incremented. addItem mutation 200.

PDP decrement to 0 removes item from cart: from qty=24 single click took qty to 0 (entire pack removed at min). Cart badge cleared. Decrease button disabled at qty=0. Cart page confirms product not present. removeCartItem 200.

Same SKU from listing+PDP creates single line item: PDP spinbutton showed '24' (synced from listing add). Subsequent + on PDP increased qty to 36 (no duplicate line). /cart shows exactly one line item per SKU. Server-side qty sync confirmed.

Cart page minimum quantity enforcement: at qty=24 (Erdinger MOQ), decrease button is disabled. At qty=36 (above MOQ), decrease enabled. Spec calls min=1, but for products with MOQ the effective minimum is the MOQ — this is BL-CART-001/006 enforcement, not a regression.

Direct input updates cart and totals: typed '48' in qty field, blur committed, qty=48 retained, line total updated to $59,232 (48 × $1,234 — note pricing: list price applied here vs. sale price at MOQ tier), Order Summary subtotal/tax/total all recalculated. No duplicate line item created.

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Invalid Input Rejected
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] negative numbers rejected — qty remains at last valid value
testCases.notes: Negative input -1 visibly accepted in spinbutton AND persisted across page refresh, even though server-side cart state is qty=1. Cart badge displays -1 (matching invalid input), causing UI desync with priced cart contents. Non-numeric 'abc' correctly rejected (browser-level type=number sanitization). See BUG-028-001 for full details.

testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Max Stock Enforcement
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: low-stock SKU (LOW_STOCK_SKU=HYN-39381935 with stock ≤ 10 not provisioned in BuildRight virtual catalog accessible to slot 3 user). Per CSV directive 2026-04-21. Run /qa-seed-data to provision before retest.
Cart qty persists after refresh: qty=24 on cart page, F5 refresh, qty=24 retained, badge unchanged. Server-side persistence confirmed. No JS errors. cart query returned consistent data.

Rapid double-click on PDP +: deterministic outcome. From qty=0, double-click resulted in qty=24 (single addition; second click suppressed/debounced during in-flight API call). No duplicate line items. No race condition errors. No console errors. Single line in cart for SKU.

Currency switch: USD->EUR via header currency selector. URL transitioned, all OrderSummary values switched to € symbol. cart query reissued with new currency context. getCart returned EUR pricing (zero amounts because Erdinger has no EUR price list, which is correctly flagged — see CART-050). No JS errors during switch.

Product without price in new currency: switching to EUR with Erdinger in cart triggered 'The product is no longer available for purchase' warning text on the line item. Unit price and line total shown as €0.00. Place Order button shows 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' (effectively blocking checkout). Cart did NOT silently apply $0.00 price; it was correctly flagged.

Subtotal/Shipping/Tax all in new currency: all OrderSummary values rendered with € symbol after switch (€0.00 for items without EUR price). No mixed currency symbols in OrderSummary. Same currency symbol used throughout the widget.

testCases.title: Cart Isolation - Org A Items Not Visible in Org B Cart
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: multi-org user (member of 2+ orgs simultaneously). Per CSV directive 2026-04-21. Slot 3 user (Carlos Rodriguez) is single-org BuildRight; CART-052/053 require MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL provisioning.

testCases.title: Cart Isolation - Org A Items Restored After Switching Back
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: same multi-org user as CART-052. Per CSV directive 2026-04-21.

testCases.title: Pack Size Enforcement - Quantity Stepper Increments by Pack Size
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: pack-size product (PACK_SIZE_SKU=26145626 with MOQ=6 not accessible to slot 3 user). Per CSV directive 2026-04-21. Note: behavior partially observed via Erdinger which has effective pack-step of 12 (24->36->48 increments) — see CART-006/035 evidence.

testCases.title: Pack Size Enforcement - Manual Non-Multiple Entry Rejected
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: same pack-size product (MOQ=6). Per CSV directive 2026-04-21. Behavior partially observed: 'Order in packs of 12' validation message shown on Erdinger when -1 was typed — see BUG-028-001.

Subset selection: deselected first line item (JACQUES) checkbox; OrderSummary subtotal decreased from $3,843.00 to $3,343.00 (delta = $500 = JACQUES line total). Item row remained visible in cart (not removed). Cart badge unchanged (item still in cart). Re-checking restored subtotal. No JS errors during selection toggle.

Coupons sidebar widget renders below OrderSummary: '.coupons-section' present in DOM, positioned below '.order-summary' (verified compareDocumentPosition). Heading 'Discount & coupons'. 4 preset coupon cards (cap of 4 enforced per usePromotionCoupons(4)). 'Custom code' card at bottom with 'Enter custom code' placeholder. 'View all coupons & promotions' link visible. VCST-4896 + VCST-4590 verified PASS.

Preset coupon apply happy path: clicked apply (arrow-right) on first preset card ($5 QA Fixed Dollar Off / FIXED5). Card transitioned from 'coupon-card--default' to 'coupon-card--applied' state. Discount line in OrderSummary updated. addCoupon mutation HTTP 200, errors[] empty. cart.coupons[0].isAppliedSuccessfully=true.

Custom code apply valid (QA10OFF): typed code in custom card input, clicked apply; card transitioned to 'coupon-card--applied' state. addCoupon HTTP 200, errors[] empty. Discount line updated in OrderSummary.

Custom code apply invalid (BOGUS123): card transitioned to 'coupon-card--error' state with error text 'Something went wrong with the coupon. Please try again.' (this is the failed_coupon i18n key, not invalid_coupon — see CART-066 note). Apply button disabled in error state. No discount line in OrderSummary. Cart total unchanged. No console TypeError — error rendered gracefully.

Radio behavior — applying B auto-removes A: applied coupon A (preset 1, $5 FIXED5), confirmed applied state; then applied coupon B (preset 2, 5% off cart subtotal). After mutation sequence: B in 'applied' state, A returned to 'default' state. Only 1 coupon applied at a time. Confirms BL-CART-009 / VCST-4896 AC#3 (no stacking). removeCoupon mutation fired before/with addCoupon for B.

Cancel applied coupon via trash icon: clicked trash icon on applied card; card returned to 'default' state. AC#5 verified: card retained in widget after removal (NOT removed from DOM, code display preserved). removeCoupon mutation HTTP 200, errors[] empty. Discount line removed from OrderSummary.

OrderSummary regression guard: no inline coupon input ('Enter a promo-coupon' textbox), no 'Deny' button, no VcActionInput inside .order-summary aside. Coupons widget is a separate sibling section below OrderSummary, NOT nested inside. Confirms VCST-4896 successfully removed legacy inline coupon UI.

View All Coupons link: 'View all coupons & promotions' link in widget has target='_blank' attribute, href=https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/account/coupons. (DOM attributes verified; click would open new tab — primary tab kept open for remaining tests.) VCST-4896 AC#1 verified.

testCases.title: Coupons Sidebar Empty State
testCases.notes: BLOCKED pending seed: NO_COUPON_USER_EMAIL not configured in env. Test requires user account with no targeted/available promotion coupons. Slot 3 BuildRight user receives all public promotions, so empty preset state cannot be reproduced.

Failed coupon error text: BOGUS123 invalid code triggered 'Something went wrong with the coupon. Please try again.' (failed_coupon translation key) instead of 'This code is not valid' (invalid_coupon). This is the backend's classification (it returned the failed-type response for an unrecognized code). Error state rendered gracefully (no console TypeError, no 5xx). Test pattern via in-DOM input substitution verified.

i18n: switched to Deutsch via header language selector (URL=/de/cart). Page title='Warenkorb'. Coupons widget heading='RABATTE & GUTSCHEINE' (translated). Custom code placeholder='Benutzerdefinierten Code eingeben' (translated). View all link='Alle Gutscheine & Aktionen anzeigen' (translated). 'Läuft ab' (Expires) translated. No raw i18n keys (e.g., 'shared.cart.coupons_section.title') visible. All 4 VCST-4896 i18n keys properly translated.

testCases.title: checkout_coupon_enabled flag does not hide widget
testCases.notes: ADVISORY test per CSV — requires Admin SPA access to toggle store setting. Not executed in this run; defer to dedicated config-flag verification when the PR author confirms intent. Behavior change documented in VCST-4896.

testCases.title: Applied coupon visible read-only on checkout review
testCases.notes: Test requires multi-step checkout with /checkout/review reachable. Per project memory feedback_checkout_multistep_gate.md, /checkout/review is gated by checkout_multistep_enabled config. Defer to suite 011 (Frontend/checkout) for review-step testing. Coupon application on /cart confirmed (CART-058/059) — checkout-page persistence is the remaining gap.

bugs.title: Cart qty input accepts negative values; display desyncs from server state
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] negative numbers rejected — qty remains at last valid value
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in (slot 3 / Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight). 2. Navigate to a buyable product (e.g., Erdinger Alkoholfrei beer 12x500ml). 3. Click + to add to cart (qty becomes 24, MOQ). 4. Navigate to /cart. 5. Click into qty spinbutton, type '-1', press Tab. 6. Refresh page.
bugs.expected: Negative input rejected; qty reverts to last valid value (24); cart badge reflects actual server qty.
bugs.actual: Input shows -1 after Tab AND after page refresh. Cart badge shows -1. OrderSummary subtotal $1,234 reflects qty=1 server-side. UI desync between input/badge display and priced cart contents. Pack-size validation 'Order in packs of 12' shown but doesn't auto-correct. 1 × GraphQL POST returned HTTP 400.
bugs.notes: Preliminary — needs qa-testing-expert investigation. Server-side validation works (clamps to 1); UI doesn't sync. Recovery: single + click snaps to MOQ. B2B impact: header badge and qty visibly disagree with priced subtotal.

consoleErrorsAggregate: Multiple × /cms-content/.../threecentsCherry-Soda-1-e1585652933596*.png 404 (broken product image asset on 'Recently browsed' / 'Customers bought together' widget — not test-blocking)
